zh.lifeSummary: 當David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff於1295年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾金加迪時，他的父親David de Graham Laird of Dundaff21歲，母親Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire24歲。他於1354年10月與Helen of Strathearn在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1357年在英國蘇格蘭被列為member of parliament (m.p.)。他去世於1373年4月4日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯蒙特洛斯享年78歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff于1295年出生在英国苏格兰培爾金加迪时，他的父亲David de Graham Laird of Dundaff21岁，母亲Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire24岁。他于1354年10月与Helen of Strathearn在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1357年在英国苏格兰被列为member of parliament (m.p.)。他去世于1373年4月4日在英国苏格兰安格斯蒙特洛斯享年78岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff was born in 1295, in Kincardine, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, was 21 and his mother, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, was 24. He married Helen of Strathearn in October 1354, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1357, at the age of 62, his occupation is listed as member of parliament (m.p.) in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 4 April 1373, in Montrose, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff est né en 1295, à Kincardine, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Helen of Strathearn en octobre 1354, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1357, à l’âge de 62 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament (m.p.) à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1373, à Montrose, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff 1295 in Kincardine, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Graham Laird of Dundaff 21 und seine Mutter Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire 24. Er hat im Oktober 1354 in Schottland, United Kingdom Helen of Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1357, als er 62 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament (m.p.) in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. April 1373 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Montrose, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff è nato il nel 1295 nel Kincardine, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Helen of Strathearn nel ottobre 1354, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1357, all'età di 62 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament (m.p.) nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 aprile 1373, nel Montrose, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaffが1295年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアキンカーディンで生まれた時，父David de Graham Laird of Dundaffは21歳，母Isabella Erskine- of Perthshireは24歳であった。1354年10月にイギリススコットランドでHelen of Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1357年，62歳の時，イギリススコットランドでの職業はmember of parliament (m.p.)と記録されている。彼は1373年4月4日にイギリススコットランドアンガスモントローゼで78歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff(이)가 1295년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 킨카딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Graham Laird of Dundaff(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1354년 10월 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Helen of Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1357년, 62세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 member of parliament (m.p.)이었다. 그는 1373년 4월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 몽로즈에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff nasceu em 1295, em Kincardine, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen of Strathearn em outubro de 1354, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1357, com 62 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament (m.p.) em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1373, em Montrose, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff родился в 1295 г. в местности кинкардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David de Graham Laird of Dundaff было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen of Strathearn октябрь 1354 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1357 году, в возрасте 62 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament (m.p.) в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 апреля 1373 г. в местности монтрос, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff nació en 1295, en Kincardine, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Helen of Strathearn en octubre de 1354, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1357, a la edad de 62 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament (m.p.) en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de abril de 1373, en Montrose, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Perthshire, Scotland.
